0.title: San Luis Way
0.description: A comprehensive digital platform connecting expatriates and locals in San Luis Potosi. The platform offers curated recommendations, cultural guides, and a trusted network of service providers to help people navigate and integrate into the city's vibrant community.

1.title: GlamLocal
1.description: Find beauty services near you and shop premium products. Discover top-rated spas, salons & beauty services, compare reviews, locations, and discover exclusive product deals -- all in one place. 50,000+ verified reviews.
